message.content:
claude: Do a full audit of this repository. Read everything before reporting. Do not modify any file.

## What to map

### 1. Project structure
- Framework and version (Next.js? Astro? Remix? Vite?)
- Package manager (confirm pnpm)
- TypeScript config — strict mode, path aliases
- List every directory under src/ (or app/, pages/) with a one-line description of what lives there

### 2. Routing
- What router is in use?
- Where is the homepage rendered? (file path)
- What layout wraps it?

### 3. Styling system
- What CSS approach is used? (Tailwind? CSS Modules? vanilla CSS? a mix?)
- Where are global styles defined?
- List every CSS custom property (--variable) currently defined, grouped by category (color, spacing, typography, radius, etc.)
- Are there any Tailwind config extensions (tailwind.config)?
- Is there a tokens file or design tokens system?

### 4. Typography
- What fonts are loaded? How? (next/font, @font-face, Google Fonts CDN?)
- Is `Google Sans Flex` configured?
- Is `N27` configured?
- How are font families referenced in CSS/components?

### 5. Components
- List every file in the components directory with a one-line description
- Are there any existing ui/ or primitives/ subdirectories?
- Is there an icon system? (SVG components, icon font, sprite?)
- Are there any animation utilities or motion libraries installed?

### 6. Data layer
- Is there a CMS? (Contentful, Sanity, Prismic?)
- Is there a content/ or data/ directory with static files?
- How is the highlights/articles data likely to be structured?

### 7. Dependencies
- List all relevant dependencies from package.json (skip devDeps unless relevant)
- Any animation lib (framer-motion, motion, GSAP)?
- Any component lib (Radix, shadcn, headless)?

## Output format
Report everything as a structured audit. End with a "Gaps & Risks" section flagging:
- Missing tokens that will be needed (typography scale, specific colors)
- Missing fonts
- Anything that will need to be created from scratch vs. extended from existing patterns

Do not implement anything.

content.text: I'll run a comprehensive audit of the repository. Let me read everything in parallel.

input.prompt:
Do a thorough exploration of this repository. I need:

1. Read package.json fully
2. Read tsconfig.json fully
3. Read astro.config.* fully
4. List all directories under src/ (one level deep)
5. List all files in src/components/ recursively
6. List all files in src/pages/ recursively
7. Read src/content.config.ts (or content/config.ts)
8. List all files in src/content/ recursively
9. Check if there's a tailwind.config.* file
10. Read .prettierrc* config
11. Read eslint config files

Report everything you find with full file contents where relevant.

input.prompt:
Do a very thorough exploration of the styling system in this repository:

1. Read src/styles/global.css fully
2. Read src/styles/tokens.css fully
3. Read src/styles/reset.css fully
4. Search for ALL @font-face declarations across the codebase
5. Search for ALL CSS custom properties (--) definitions across the codebase
6. Check public/fonts/ directory - list all font files
7. Search for any Google Fonts CDN links
8. Search for "font-family" declarations across all files
9. Search for any references to "N27" or "Google Sans" in the codebase
10. Check if there's any tailwind.config file
11. Read src/layouts/base.astro fully

Report everything with full file contents.

1→import { defineCollection, reference, z } from "astro:content";
     2→import { glob, type Loader } from "astro/loaders";
     3→
     4→// ============================================================
     5→// Shared schemas (reusable across collections)
     6→// ============================================================
     7→
     8→const seoSchema = z.object({
     9→  metaTitle: z.string().optional(),
    10→  metaDescription: z.string().optional(),
    11→  ogImage: z.string().optional(),
    12→});
    13→
    14→/**
    15→ * A single metric shown on project cards (e.g. "55%↑", "3.2x").
    16→ * Used in project frontmatter and rendered on the homepage showcase.
    17→ */
    18→const metricSchema = z.object({
    19→  value: z.string(),
    20→  label: z.string(),
    21→});
    22→
    23→// ============================================================
    24→// Loader
    25→// ============================================================
    26→const contentLoader = ({ base, extensions }: { extensions: string[]; base: string }): Loader => {
    27→  // id generation: strip file extensions for clean URLs
    28→  const stripExtension = ({ entry }: { entry: string }) => {
    29→    return entry.replace(/\.(mdx?|yaml)$/, "");
    30→  };
    31→
    32→  // filter drafts only in production
    33→  const draftFilter = import.meta.env.MODE === "development" ? "**" : "!(*.draft)";
    34→  // filter extensions
    35→  const extensionFilter = extensions.length > 1 ? `{${extensions.join(",")}}` : extensions[0];
    36→
    37→  return glob({
    38→    pattern: `**/${draftFilter}.${extensionFilter}`,
    39→    base,
    40→    generateId: stripExtension,
    41→  });
    42→};
    43→
    44→// ============================================================
    45→// Collections
    46→// ============================================================
    47→
    48→const projects = defineCollection({
    49→  loader: contentLoader({
    50→    base: "src/content/projects",
    51→    extensions: ["mdx"],
    52→  }),
    53→  schema: z.object({
    54→    title: z.string(),
    55→    tagline: z.string().optional(),
    56→    client: z.string().optional(),
    57→    date: z.coerce.date(),
    58→    thumbnail: z.string(),
    59→    /** Large hero image for homepage showcase and project detail header */
    60→    heroImage: z.string().optional(),
    61→    tags: z.array(z.string()).default([]),
    62→    /** Industry categories for filtering (e.g., "fintech", "e-commerce", "healthcare") */
    63→    industry: z.array(z.string()).default([]),
    64→    /** Deliverable types for filtering (e.g., "website", "mobile-app", "design-system") */
    65→    deliverable: z.array(z.string()).default([]),
    66→    /** Key metrics shown on project cards (e.g. conversion uplift, NPS) */
    67→    metrics: z.array(metricSchema).default([]),
    68→    seo: seoSchema.optional(),
    69→    relatedProjects: z.array(reference("projects")).default([]),
    70→  }),
    71→});
    72→
    73→const blog = defineCollection({
    74→  loader: contentLoader({
    75→    extensions: ["md", "mdx"],
    76→    base: "src/content/blog",
    77→  }),
    78→  schema: z.object({
    79→    title: z.string(),
    80→    description: z.string().optional(),
    81→    date: z.coerce.date(),
    82→    author: z.string().optional(),
    83→    thumbnail: z.string().optional(),
    84→    tags: z.array(z.string()).default([]),
    85→    seo: seoSchema.optional(),
    86→    relatedProjects: z.array(reference("projects")).default([]),
    87→  }),
    88→});
    89→
    90→const playground = defineCollection({
    91→  loader: contentLoader({
    92→    extensions: ["md", "mdx"],
    93→    base: "src/content/playground",
    94→  }),
    95→  schema: z.object({
    96→    title: z.string(),
    97→    description: z.string(),
    98→    date: z.coerce.date(),
    99→    repoUrl: z.string().url().optional(),
   100→    thumbnail: z.string().optional(),
   101→    tags: z.array(z.string()).default([]),
   102→    seo: seoSchema.optional(),
   103→  }),
   104→});
   105→
   106→const pages = defineCollection({
   107→  loader: contentLoader({
   108→    extensions: ["mdx"],
   109→    base: "src/content/pages",
   110→  }),
   111→  schema: z.object({
   112→    title: z.string(),
   113→    seo: seoSchema.optional(),
   114→  }),
   115→});
   116→
   117→// ============================================================
   118→// Homepage highlights
   119→// ============================================================
   120→// Each entry references an item in another collection.
   121→// Astro validates every slug at build time: typos break the build, not prod.
   122→
   123→const highlights = defineCollection({
   124→  loader: contentLoader({
   125→    extensions: ["yaml"],
   126→    base: "src/content/highlights",
   127→  }),
   128→  schema: z.object({
   129→    label: z.string().optional(),
   130→    source: z.discriminatedUnion("collection", [
   131→      z.object({
   132→        collection: z.literal("projects"),
   133→        entry: reference("projects"),
   134→      }),
   135→      z.object({
   136→        collection: z.literal("blog"),
   137→        entry: reference("blog"),
   138→      }),
   139→      z.object({
   140→        collection: z.literal("playground"),
   141→        entry: reference("playground"),
   142→      }),
   143→    ]),
   144→    order: z.number(),
   145→  }),
   146→});
   147→
   148→// ============================================================
   149→// Clients — logo strip, references across the site
   150→// ============================================================
   151→// YAML entries for each client. Used by the homepage logo strip,
   152→// project pages, and anywhere we need to show who we work with.
   153→
   154→const clients = defineCollection({
   155→  loader: contentLoader({
   156→    extensions: ["yaml"],
   157→    base: "src/content/clients",
   158→  }),
   159→  schema: z.object({
   160→    name: z.string(),
   161→    /** Path to SVG logo in public/ (e.g. "/logos/boeing.svg") */
   162→    logo: z.string(),
   163→    url: z.string().url().optional(),
   164→    order: z.number().default(0),
   165→  }),
   166→});
   167→
   168→// ============================================================
   169→// Testimonials — customer quotes
   170→// ============================================================
   171→// YAML entries for client testimonials. Used on the homepage,
   172→// and potentially on project pages or a dedicated social proof section.
   173→
   174→const testimonials = defineCollection({
   175→  loader: contentLoader({
   176→    extensions: ["yaml"],
   177→    base: "src/content/testimonials",
   178→  }),
   179→  schema: z.object({
   180→    quote: z.string(),
   181→    author: z.string(),
   182→    role: z.string(),
   183→    company: z.string(),
   184→    /** CDN path to author avatar (optional) */
   185→    avatar: z.string().optional(),
   186→    order: z.number().default(0),
   187→  }),
   188→});
   189→
   190→// ============================================================
   191→// Awards — recognition and validation
   192→// ============================================================
   193→// YAML entries for awards and recognitions. Shown on the homepage
   194→// in a scrollable list. Each award references the project it was for.
   195→
   196→const awards = defineCollection({
   197→  loader: contentLoader({
   198→    extensions: ["yaml"],
   199→    base: "src/content/awards",
   200→  }),
   201→  schema: z.object({
   202→    /** Award name (e.g. "Red Dot", "Awwwards Site of the Day") */
   203→    award: z.string(),
   204→    year: z.number(),
   205→    /** Project that won the award — validated at build time */
   206→    project: reference("projects"),
   207→    /** External link to the award page (optional) */
   208→    url: z.string().url().optional(),
   209→    order: z.number().default(0),
   210→  }),
   211→});
   212→
   213→// ============================================================
   214→// Handbook groups — visual categories on the handbook index
   215→// ============================================================
   216→// Each group has a title and an order. Handbook pages reference
   217→// a group by its filename slug (e.g. "engineering", "design").
   218→
   219→const handbookGroups = defineCollection({
   220→  loader: contentLoader({
   221→    extensions: ["yaml"],
   222→    base: "src/content/handbook-groups",
   223→  }),
   224→  schema: z.object({
   225→    title: z.string(),
   226→    order: z.number(),
   227→  }),
   228→});
   229→
   230→// ============================================================
   231→// Handbook — internal company documentation
   232→// ============================================================
   233→// MDX files in src/content/handbook/, organized in directories
   234→// for parent-child nesting. File path determines URL:
   235→//   culture.mdx                      → /handbook/culture
   236→//   how-we-build-software.mdx        → /handbook/how-we-build-software
   237→//   how-we-build-software/front-end.mdx → /handbook/how-we-build-software/front-end
   238→//
   239→// `group` references a handbook-groups entry (validated at build time).
   240→// `order` controls sort position within a group on the index page.
   241→// Parent pages (those with children) are identified at query time
   242→// by checking if any other entry's id starts with their id + "/".
   243→
   244→const handbook = defineCollection({
   245→  loader: contentLoader({
   246→    extensions: ["mdx"],
   247→    base: "src/content/handbook",
   248→  }),
   249→  schema: z.object({
   250→    title: z.string(),
   251→    description: z.string().optional(),
   252→    /** Last updated date */
   253→    date: z.coerce.date(),
   254→    /** Cover image displayed at the top of the page (CDN path) */
   255→    coverImage: z.string().optional(),
   256→    /** Reference to a handbook-groups entry */
   257→    group: reference("handbook-groups"),
   258→    /** Sort order within the group on the index page */
   259→    order: z.number().default(0),
   260→    seo: seoSchema.optional(),
   261→  }),
   262→});
   263→
   264→export const collections = {
   265→  projects,
   266→  blog,
   267→  playground,
   268→  pages,
   269→  highlights,
   270→  clients,
   271→  testimonials,
   272→  awards,
   273→  "handbook-groups": handbookGroups,
   274→  handbook,
   275→};

1→import MediaImage from "./media-image.astro";
     2→import MediaVideo from "./media-video.astro";
     3→import ComparisonBlock from "./comparison-block.astro";
     4→import Metrics from "./metrics.astro";
     5→import ProjectCrossSell from "./project-cross-sell.astro";
     6→
     7→/**
     8→ * MDX component registry.
     9→ *
    10→ * Import this in every `[slug].astro` page that renders MDX content
    11→ * and pass it to `<Content components={mdxComponents} />`.
    12→ *
    13→ * When adding a new MDX component:
    14→ * 1. Create the `.astro` file in `src/components/mdx/`
    15→ * 2. Import and add it here
    16→ * 3. That's it — all slug pages pick it up automatically
    17→ */
    18→export const mdxComponents = {
    19→  MediaImage,
    20→  MediaVideo,
    21→  ComparisonBlock,
    22→  Metrics,
    23→  ProjectCrossSell,
    24→};
    25→

1→/**
     2→ * Mosaic Icon System
     3→ *
     4→ * Icons are composed on a grid of cells (default 2px each). Each cell contains
     5→ * an "egg" (the Significa oval) at one of 5 scale levels. The size gradient
     6→ * across cells creates sub-pixel anti-aliasing.
     7→ *
     8→ * Icons can define two states (idle/hover) with different grid layouts.
     9→ * Transitions between states are driven by the parent via CSS custom properties:
    10→ *   --mosaic-state: 0 (idle, default) | 1 (active/hover)
    11→ *   --mosaic-duration: transition duration (default: --duration-fast)
    12→ *   --mosaic-ease: easing function (default: --ease-out)
    13→ *
    14→ * Color inherits via currentColor from the parent context.
    15→ */
    16→
    17→export type MosaicLevel = 0 | 1 | 2 | 3 | 4;
    18→
    19→export interface MosaicIconDef {
    20→  /** Number of columns in the grid */
    21→  cols: number;
    22→  /** Default state grid (flat array of size levels) */
    23→  idle: MosaicLevel[];
    24→  /** Optional hover/active state grid */
    25→  hover?: MosaicLevel[];
    26→}
    27→
    28→/**
    29→ * Scale factor for each size level (fraction of cell size).
    30→ * 0 = invisible, 1(xs) = 27.5%, 2(s) = 57.5%, 3(m) = 87.5%, 4(l) = 100%
    31→ */
    32→export const MOSAIC_SCALES: readonly number[] = [0, 0.275, 0.575, 0.875, 1];
    33→

content.text:
Here is the complete picture of the repository.

---

## Repository Exploration Report

### 1. `package.json`

```json
{
  "name": "significa.co",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "private": true,
  "type": "module",
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "astro dev",
    "build": "astro build",
    "preview": "astro preview",
    "check": "astro check",
    "format": "prettier --write --list-different ./src",
    "format:check": "prettier --check ./src",
    "lint": "pnpm format:check && pnpm check && pnpm lint:check",
    "lint:check": "eslint .",
    "lint:fix": "eslint . --fix"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@astrojs/mdx": "^4.3.13",
    "@astrojs/react": "^4.4.2",
    "@astrojs/rss": "^4.0.15",
    "@astrojs/sitemap": "^3.7.0",
    "astro": "^5.17.3",
    "react": "^19.2.4",
    "react-dom": "^19.2.4"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@astrojs/check": "^0.9.6",
    "@types/react": "^19.2.14",
    "@types/react-dom": "^19.2.3",
    "@typescript-eslint/parser": "^8.56.1",
    "eslint": "^10.0.2",
    "eslint-plugin-astro": "^1.6.0",
    "eslint-plugin-check-file": "^3.3.1",
    "prettier": "^3.8.1",
    "prettier-plugin-astro": "^0.14.1",
    "typescript": "^5.9.3",
    "typescript-eslint": "^8.56.1"
  }
}
```

Key observations: Astro v5.17.3, React 19, no Tailwind, no test framework, no Biome. `@astrojs/rss` is in deps but not in integrations (used as an API route directly).

---

### 2. `tsconfig.json`

```json
{
  "extends": "astro/tsconfigs/strict",
  "compilerOptions": {
    "jsx": "react-jsx",
    "jsxImportSource": "react",
    "baseUrl": ".",
    "paths": {
      "@/*": ["./src/*"]
    }
  }
}
```

Strict mode via Astro's preset. Path alias `@/` maps to `src/`.

---

### 3. `astro.config.mjs`

```js
import { defineConfig } from "astro/config";
import mdx from "@astrojs/mdx";
import react from "@astrojs/react";
import sitemap from "@astrojs/sitemap";

export default defineConfig({
  site: "https://significa.co",
  integrations: [mdx(), react(), sitemap()],
});
```

Three integrations: MDX, React (islands), Sitemap. No adapter configured (Cloudflare Pages static output).

---

### 4. `src/` directories (one level deep)

```
components/
content/
content.config.ts
env.d.ts
layouts/
lib/
pages/
styles/
```

---

### 5. `src/components/` (all files, recursive)

```
src/components/mosaic-icon.astro          (new, untracked)
src/components/award-row.astro
src/components/blog-card.astro
src/components/footer.astro
src/components/header.astro
src/components/highlight-card.astro
src/components/project-card.astro
src/components/seo.astro
src/components/service-list.astro
src/components/mdx/
  comparison-block.astro
  components.ts
  media-image.astro
  media-video.astro
  metrics.astro
  project-cross-sell.astro
```

No `ui/` subdirectory yet. No React components despite `@astrojs/react` being configured.

---

### 6. `src/pages/` (all files, recursive)

```
src/pages/index.astro                     (modified, per git status)
src/pages/404.astro
src/pages/[...slug].astro
src/pages/careers.astro
src/pages/impact.astro
src/pages/legal.astro
src/pages/what-we-do.astro
src/pages/who-we-are.astro
src/pages/work-with-us.astro
src/pages/blog/
  index.astro
  [slug].astro
  rss.xml.ts
src/pages/handbook/
  index.astro
  [...slug].astro
src/pages/playground/
  index.astro
  [slug].astro
src/pages/projects/
  index.astro
  [slug].astro
```

Note: The CLAUDE.md docs mention `labs/` but the actual pages use `playground/` instead.

---

### 7. `src/content.config.ts` (full)

10 collections defined:

| Collection | Type | Base path |
|---|---|---|
| `projects` | MDX | `src/content/projects` |
| `blog` | MD + MDX | `src/content/blog` |
| `playground` | MD + MDX | `src/content/playground` |
| `pages` | MDX | `src/content/pages` |
| `highlights` | YAML | `src/content/highlights` |
| `clients` | YAML | `src/content/clients` |
| `testimonials` | YAML | `src/content/testimonials` |
| `awards` | YAML | `src/content/awards` |
| `handbook-groups` | YAML | `src/content/handbook-groups` |
| `handbook` | MDX | `src/content/handbook` |

Key patterns: custom `contentLoader` wraps Astro's `glob()`, strips extensions from IDs for clean URLs, filters `*.draft.*` files in production. Cross-collection links use `reference()` validated at build time.

---

### 8. `src/content/` (all files, recursive)

```
awards/          8 yaml files (awwwards, ecommerce, european-design, german-design, good-design, if-design, red-dot)
blog/            3 files (designing-complex-products.mdx, designing-for-fintech.mdx, hello-world.md)
clients/         10 yaml files (allo, bion, birdeatsbug, boeing, emma, fc-porto, hey-harper, mishmash, petzai, rocket-chat)
handbook-groups/ 9 yaml files (brand-and-marketing, changelog, design, engineering, knowing-significa, recruitment, strategy-and-product, working-at-significa, working-with-significa)
handbook/        8 mdx files (changelog, how-we-build-software, how-we-build-software/back-end-development, how-we-build-software/front-end-development, manifesto, mission-and-values, mission-and-values/code-of-ethics, playbook, significa-history)
highlights/      4 yaml files (01 through 04)
pages/           2 mdx files (about, services)
playground/      2 mdx files (astro-toolkit, example-lab)
projects/        2 mdx files (mishmash, planit-app)
testimonials/    3 yaml files (justin-seidl, miguel-santos, sarah-chen)
```

---

### 9. Tailwind config

None found. No `tailwind.config.*` anywhere. Confirmed: no CSS framework in use.

---

### 10. `.prettierrc.mjs`

```js
export default {
  semi: true,
  singleQuote: false,
  printWidth: 128,
  tabWidth: 2,
  trailingComma: "es5",
  bracketSpacing: true,
  arrowParens: "always",
  endOfLine: "lf",
  plugins: ["prettier-plugin-astro"],
  overrides: [{ files: "*.astro", options: { parser: "astro" } }],
};
```

Note: `prettier-plugin-tailwindcss` mentioned in MEMORY.md as vestigial is NOT present here anymore (or was never in this version). Only `prettier-plugin-astro`.

---

### 11. `eslint.config.mjs`

```js
import eslintPluginAstro from "eslint-plugin-astro";
import checkFile from "eslint-plugin-check-file";
import tseslint from "typescript-eslint";

export default [
  ...tseslint.configs.recommended,
  ...eslintPluginAstro.configs.recommended,
  {
    files: ["**/*.{js,mjs,cjs,ts,tsx,astro}"],
    rules: {
      "@typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars": ["error", {
        argsIgnorePattern: "^_",
        varsIgnorePattern: "^_",
      }],
    },
  },
  {
    // Allow triple-slash references in env.d.ts
    files: ["src/env.d.ts"],
    rules: { "@typescript-eslint/triple-slash-reference": "off" },
  },
  {
    // Enforce kebab-case filenames in src/
    files: ["src/**/*"],
    ignores: ["src/pages/**/\\[*", "src/pages/404.astro"],
    plugins: { "check-file": checkFile },
    rules: {
      "check-file/filename-naming-convention": [
        "error",
        { "**/*.{js,mjs,ts,tsx,astro,css,md,mdx,yaml}": "KEBAB_CASE" },
        { ignoreMiddleExtensions: true },
      ],
      "check-file/folder-naming-convention": ["error", { "src/**/": "KEBAB_CASE" }],
    },
  },
  { ignores: ["dist/**", "node_modules/**", ".astro/**"] },
];
```

Flat config (ESLint v9+). Three plugins: `typescript-eslint`, `eslint-plugin-astro`, `eslint-plugin-check-file`. The kebab-case filename rule uses `ignoreMiddleExtensions: true`, which means `foo.draft.mdx` passes (the `.draft` middle extension is ignored).

---

### Summary of notable observations

1. `@astrojs/rss` is in `dependencies` but not in `astro.config.mjs` integrations. It's used directly in `src/pages/blog/rss.xml.ts` as an API route.
2. No React components exist yet despite `@astrojs/react` being configured.
3. The project structure in CLAUDE.md mentions `labs/` but the actual implementation uses `playground/` throughout.
4. Two untracked files on the current `design` branch: `src/components/mosaic-icon.astro` and `src/lib/mosaic-icons.ts`. These plus the modified `src/pages/index.astro` and `src/styles/tokens.css` are the active work-in-progress.
5. No test framework, no Biome, no dark mode, no Tailwind. Clean dependency surface.

```js
    // Allow triple-slash references in env.d.ts
    files: ["src/env.d.ts"],
    rules: { "@typescript-eslint/triple-slash-reference": "off" },
  },
  {
    // Enforce kebab-case filenames in src/
    files: ["src/**/*"],
    ignores: ["src/pages/**/\\[*", "src/pages/404.astro"],
    plugins: { "check-file": checkFile },
    rules: {
      "check-file/filename-naming-convention": [
        "error",
        { "**/*.{js,mjs,ts,tsx,astro,css,md,mdx,yaml}": "KEBAB_CASE" },
        { ignoreMiddleExtensions: true },
      ],
      "check-file/folder-naming-convention": ["error", { "src/**/": "KEBAB_CASE" }],
    },
  },
  { ignores: ["dist/**", "node_modules/**", ".astro/**"] },
];
```

Flat config (ESLint v9+). Three plugins: `typescript-eslint`, `eslint-plugin-astro`, `eslint-plugin-check-file`. The kebab-case filename rule uses `ignoreMiddleExtensions: true`, which means `foo.draft.mdx` passes (the `.draft` middle extension is ignored).

---

### Summary of notable observations

1. `@astrojs/rss` is in `dependencies` but not in `astro.config.mjs` integrations. It's used directly in `src/pages/blog/rss.xml.ts` as an API route.
2. No React components exist yet despite `@astrojs/react` being configured.
3. The project structure in CLAUDE.md mentions `labs/` but the actual implementation uses `playground/` throughout.
4. Two untracked files on the current `design` branch: `src/components/mosaic-icon.astro` and `src/lib/mosaic-icons.ts`. These plus the modified `src/pages/index.astro` and `src/styles/tokens.css` are the active work-in-progress.
5. No test framework, no Biome, no dark mode, no Tailwind. Clean dependency surface.

Here is the full report of the styling system.

---

## Styling System: Complete Report

### File Structure

There are exactly 3 CSS files, all in `/Users/andrefurt/code/significa.co/src/styles/`:

- `reset.css` - CSS reset
- `tokens.css` - All design tokens as CSS custom properties
- `global.css` - Entry point: imports both above, declares `@font-face`, sets base styles

No Tailwind config exists anywhere in the codebase (the `.prettierrc.mjs` has the Tailwind plugin configured but it's vestigial).

---

### `/Users/andrefurt/code/significa.co/src/styles/reset.css`

A minimal, modern reset:

- Universal `box-sizing: border-box`, zero margin/padding
- `html`: antialiasing (`-webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased`, `-moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale`), `text-size-adjust: 100%`
- `body`: `min-height: 100dvh`, `line-height: 1.6`
- Media elements (`img`, `picture`, `video`, `canvas`, `svg`): `display: block; max-width: 100%`
- Form controls: `font: inherit`
- Text elements: `overflow-wrap: break-word`

---

### `/Users/andrefurt/code/significa.co/src/styles/tokens.css`

All tokens live in `:root` across four blocks:

**Color Palettes (OKLCH) - 10 palettes, 15 shades each (25 through 950):**

| Palette | Hue |
|---|---|
| `--gray-*` | 73.8 (warm neutral, base `#1e1a15`) |
| `--beige-*` | 87.5 |
| `--green-*` | 104.9 |
| `--marine-*` | 185.2 |
| `--orange-*` | 73.0 |
| `--purple-*` | 307.1 |
| `--yellow-*` | 88.2 |
| `--sea-*` | 231.9 |
| `--red-*` | 36.0 |
| `--pink-*` | 344.1 |

Each palette has shades: 25, 50, 100, 150, 200, 300, 400, 500, 600, 700, 800, 850, 900, 925, 950.

**Semantic Colors:**

```css
--color-text:          var(--gray-950)
--color-text-muted:    var(--gray-600)
--color-surface:       var(--gray-25)
--color-surface-alt:   var(--gray-50)
--color-border:        var(--gray-200)
--color-border-subtle: color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-text) 12%, transparent)
--color-primary:       oklch(45% 0.15 264)
--color-primary-hover: oklch(38% 0.15 264)
--color-error:         oklch(55% 0.2 27)
--color-success:       oklch(55% 0.15 155)
```

**Typography:**

```css
--font-sans:    "Google Sans Flex", system-ui, sans-serif
--font-display: "N27", system-ui, sans-serif
--font-mono:    ui-monospace, "Cascadia Mono", "Segoe UI Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, monospace

--text-sm:   clamp(0.8125rem, 0.75rem + 0.2vw, 0.875rem)
--text-base: clamp(0.9375rem, 0.875rem + 0.2vw, 1rem)
--text-lg:   clamp(1.125rem, 1rem + 0.4vw, 1.25rem)
--text-xl:   clamp(1.25rem, 1rem + 0.8vw, 1.5rem)
--text-2xl:  clamp(1.5rem, 1rem + 1.5vw, 2rem)
--text-3xl:  clamp(2rem, 1rem + 3vw, 3rem)
--text-4xl:  clamp(2.5rem, 1.5rem + 4vw, 4rem)

--leading-tight:  1.2
--leading-normal: 1.6

--weight-normal:   400
--weight-medium:   500
--weight-semibold: 600
--weight-bold:     700
```

**Layout:**

```css
--max-width:        72rem  /* 1152px */
--max-width-narrow: 48rem  /* 768px */
--gutter:           1.5rem /* 24px */
```

**Transitions:**

```css
--duration-fast:   150ms
--duration-normal: 250ms
--duration-slow:   400ms
--ease-out:        cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)
```

---

### `/Users/andrefurt/code/significa.co/src/styles/global.css`

**Font Loading - `@font-face` declarations (all N27, all `@/public/fonts/`):**

| Weight | File |
|---|---|
| 100 | `N27-Thin.otf` |
| 200 | `N27-ExtraLight.otf` |
| 300 | `N27-Light.otf` |
| 400 | `N27-Regular.otf` |
| 500 | `N27-Medium.otf` |
| 700 | `N27-Bold.otf` |

All use `font-display: swap` and `format("opentype")`.

**Base Styles:**

```css
body        { font-family: var(--font-sans); font-size: var(--text-base); color: var(--color-text); background-color: var(--color-surface); }
a           { color: var(--color-primary); text-decoration-skip-ink: auto; }
a:hover     { color: var(--color-primary-hover); }
h1-h4       { line-height: var(--leading-tight); font-weight: var(--weight-bold); }
code, pre   { font-family: var(--font-mono); }
```

**Utility classes:** `.sr-only`, `.skip-link` (with focus reveal via transform).

**`prefers-reduced-motion` media query** that collapses all animation/transition durations to 0.01ms.

---

### `/Users/andrefurt/code/significa.co/public/fonts/`

Only N27 files are self-hosted. All 6 OTF files:

```
N27-Thin.otf        (33KB)
N27-ExtraLight.otf  (34KB)
N27-Light.otf       (35KB)
N27-Regular.otf     (35KB)
N27-Medium.otf      (35KB)
N27-Bold.otf        (36KB)
```

No other font files. No woff/woff2 formats. No Google Sans Flex files locally - it is loaded from Google Fonts CDN.

---

### `/Users/andrefurt/code/significa.co/src/layouts/base.astro`

The Google Fonts CDN link lives here:

```html
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Google+Sans+Flex:wght@100..900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
```

Google Sans Flex is loaded as a variable font with the full weight axis (100 to 900). It is never self-hosted.

`global.css` is imported here via `import "@/styles/global.css"` in the frontmatter (Astro handles it as a link tag at build time).

---

### Component-level `font-family` usage

`var(--font-display)` (N27) is used in scoped `<style>` blocks in:

- `/Users/andrefurt/code/significa.co/src/pages/index.astro` (lines 242, 251, 383, 391)
- `/Users/andrefurt/code/significa.co/src/components/service-list.astro` (line 48)
- `/Users/andrefurt/code/significa.co/src/components/award-row.astro` (line 55)
- `/Users/andrefurt/code/significa.co/src/components/blog-card.astro` (line 86)
- `/Users/andrefurt/code/significa.co/src/components/highlight-card.astro` (lines 71, 79)
- `/Users/andrefurt/code/significa.co/src/components/project-card.astro` (lines 72, 101)

One hardcoded `font-family` stack (not via a token) exists in `/Users/andrefurt/code/significa.co/src/pages/blog/[slug].astro` line 343 for inline code blocks (a monospace stack: `ui-monospace, "Cascadia Code", "Source Code Pro", Menlo, Consolas, "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace`). That's a deviation from `--font-mono`.

---

### Component-scoped CSS custom properties (inline style / locally-scoped)

These are set at the element level as inline styles, not in `:root`:

| Property | Component | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `--mosaic-state` | `mosaic-icon.astro`, `index.astro` | 0=idle, 1=active state toggle |
| `--mosaic-duration` | `mosaic-icon.astro` | transition duration override |
| `--mosaic-ease` | `mosaic-icon.astro` | easing override |
| `--cols` | `mosaic-icon.astro` | grid column count |
| `--visual-s` | `mosaic-icon.astro` | computed visual scale |
| `--active` | `mosaic-icon.astro` | clamped 0/1 active flag |
| `--media-bg` | `blog-card.astro` | per-card background color |
| `--card-bg` | `highlight-card.astro`, `project-card.astro` | per-card background |
| `--card-fg` | `highlight-card.astro`, `project-card.astro` | per-card foreground |

---

### Key Observations

1. **Two fonts, two loading strategies.** N27 is self-hosted OTF (display/headings). Google Sans Flex is CDN-loaded variable font (body). No woff2 conversion has been done for N27 - OTF is being served directly, which is suboptimal for web performance.

2. **No Tailwind.** No tailwind config exists. The `prettier-plugin-tailwindcss` in `.prettierrc.mjs` is vestigial.

3. **Token coverage is comprehensive** but `--font-mono` is bypassed in `blog/[slug].astro` with a hardcoded stack. Minor inconsistency.

4. **No dark mode tokens.** Everything is light-mode only. No `prefers-color-scheme` media query in any CSS file.

5. **10 OKLCH palette families** were added recently (commit `7538a16d`) and are available as raw palette tokens, but currently only gray shades are used by the semantic aliases. The other 9 palettes (beige, green, marine, orange, purple, yellow, sea, red, pink) exist in tokens but are not yet wired into semantic aliases.

6. **Highlights** — 2fr/1fr grid of two `HighlightCard` components (hardcoded copy)

**Color palettes (OKLCH):** 10 palettes, each with 15 stops (25 to 950): gray, beige, green, marine, orange, purple, yellow, sea, red, pink.

- `--color-surface-alt`: `--gray-50`

- `--color-border-subtle`: `color-mix(in oklch, text 12%, transparent)`
- `--color-primary`: `oklch(45% 0.15 264)` (blue-ish)
- `--color-primary-hover`: `oklch(38% 0.15 264)`
- `--color-error` / `--color-success`

**Typography:**
- `--font-sans`: "Google Sans Flex" (variable, loaded via CDN)
- `--font-display`: "N27" (self-hosted in `/public/fonts/`, 6 weights: 100/200/300/400/500/700)
- `--font-mono`: system monospace stack

- Line heights: `--leading-tight: 1.2`, `--leading-normal: 1.6` (note: `--leading-relaxed` referenced in blog but not defined — likely missing token)

**Layout:**
- `--max-width: 72rem` (1152px)
- `--max-width-narrow: 48rem` (768px)
- `--gutter: 1.5rem` (24px)

**Transitions:**
- `--duration-fast: 150ms`
- `--duration-normal: 250ms`
- `--duration-slow: 400ms`

---

### Notable Findings and Gaps

1. **`--leading-relaxed` is used in `blog/[slug].astro`** (for `p` elements) but is not defined in `tokens.css`. This will fall back to the browser default and is a missing token.

2. **`--text-xs` is referenced** in `project-card.astro`, `project-cross-sell.astro`, and `blog/index.astro` but is not defined in `tokens.css`. Missing token.

3. **`--color-primary`** is used for checkboxes/filter UI in `projects/index.astro` and `--color-primary-hover` for hover states, but these tokens are defined as OKLCH blue values. They are not used anywhere in the homepage design.

4. **The `projects/[slug].astro` detail page has zero styling** — just a bare `<article>` with `<header>`. Clearly a placeholder.

5. **`blog-card.astro`** has no image support — the `card-media` div is a colored placeholder only. The actual `blog/index.astro` and `blog/[slug].astro` pages render their own image tags directly, bypassing this component.

6. **Homepage is using hardcoded mock data** for 6 of 7 sections (only highlights are from content). Awards, project metrics, services, blog posts, and highlight cards are all hardcoded in the frontmatter script.

7. **`awards` YAML files** use a plain string for `project` (`project: mishmash`) not a typed `reference()`. However `collections.ts` calls `getEntry("projects", a.data.project.id)` — meaning the schema likely uses `reference("projects")` which resolves to an object with an `.id` property. The YAML `project: mishmash` is shorthand that Astro resolves automatically.

8. **`careers.astro`** references `https://assets.significa.co/website/test-TKzoOc.png` (a test placeholder image), as do `impact.astro`, `who-we-are.astro`, and `playground/index.astro`. These are clearly in-progress pages using placeholder assets.

9. **`--color-text-subtle`** is referenced in `tokens.css` comment style (`color-mix`) but no component uses it directly as a named token.

10. **Google Sans Flex is loaded via Google Fonts CDN** (`fonts.googleapis.com`) in `base.astro`, while N27 is self-hosted. This means a third-party font dependency for the body typeface.

Props: `title`, `subtitle?`, `bg?`, `fg?`, `size?: "large"|"small"` (default large), `href?`. Card with colored background, text at bottom. Large = text-3xl title, small = text-2xl.

**`/Users/andrefurt/code/significa.co/src/components/project-card.astro`**
Props: `title`, `bg?`, `fg?`, `metrics?: Array<{value, label, trend?: "up"|"down"}>`, `href?`. Square aspect ratio (1/1). Title top-left, metrics bottom-left. Trend shown as ↑/↓ arrows with green-400/red-400 colors.

**`/Users/andrefurt/code/significa.co/src/components/seo.astro`**
Props: `title`, `description`, `ogImage?`, `type?: "website"|"article"`, `publishedAt?: Date`. Outputs `<title>`, description meta, canonical, OG tags, Twitter card tags, and `article:published_time` for articles.

**`/Users/andrefurt/code/significa.co/src/components/service-list.astro`**
Props: `title: string`, `items: ServiceItem[]` (label + optional href). Grid: 1fr 2fr (title left, list right). Each item has a `→` arrow that translates 4px on hover.

#### MDX components (`src/components/mdx/`)

**`components.ts`** — Central registry exporting `mdxComponents` object with: `MediaImage`, `MediaVideo`, `ComparisonBlock`, `Metrics`, `ProjectCrossSell`.

**`media-image.astro`** — Props: `src`, `alt`, `width`, `height`, `caption?`, `eager?`, `sizes?`, `quality?`. Builds CDN URL + srcset. Wraps in `<figure>` if caption provided. Validates all required props at build time via `contentError()`.

**`media-video.astro`** — Props: `src`, `poster?`, `caption?`, `autoplay?`, `controls?`. CDN URL for both src and poster. Autoplay sets muted/loop/playsinline/preload="auto".

**`comparison-block.astro`** — Props: `before: {src, label, alt?}`, `after: {src, label, alt?}`. Side-by-side 2-column grid of CDN images (960px width). Both required; throws at build if missing.

**`metrics.astro`** — Props: `items: {value, label}[]`. `<dl>` with auto-fit grid (minmax 10rem). Values are text-2xl bold, labels are sm muted. Requires at least one item.

**`project-cross-sell.astro`** — Props: `project: string` (slug), `title?`, `description?`. Fetches project via `getEntry("projects", slug)`. Renders thumbnail (640px CDN) + title/tagline aside block. Throws at build if project not found.

---

### src/lib/

**5 lib files:**

**`/Users/andrefurt/code/significa.co/src/lib/mosaic-icons.ts`**
Defines the mosaic icon system types and data. `MosaicLevel = 0|1|2|3|4`. `MOSAIC_SCALES = [0, 0.275, 0.575, 0.875, 1]`. Currently only one icon defined: `arrow` (7x7 grid, with idle and hover states). Exported types: `MosaicLevel`, `MosaicIconDef`, `MosaicIconName`.

**`/Users/andrefurt/code/significa.co/src/lib/cdn.ts`**
CDN hostname: `https://cdn.significa.co`. Srcset widths: [640, 960, 1280, 1920]. Default quality: 80.
- `cdnUrl(src, options?)` — prepends CDN hostname to relative paths, appends `?width=&quality=&format=` params. Passes through external URLs (adds params only if on own CDN).
- `cdnSrcset(src, options?)` — returns `undefined` for non-CDN external URLs; generates multi-width srcset string otherwise.
- Exports: `CDN_HOSTNAME`, `DEFAULT_QUALITY`, `SRCSET_WIDTHS`.

**`/Users/andrefurt/code/significa.co/src/lib/collections.ts`**
All content access helpers — all async, use `getCollection`/`getEntry` from `astro:content`:
- `getProjects()` — sorted by date desc
- `getPosts()` — sorted by date desc
- `getPlayground()` — sorted by date desc
- `getClients()` — sorted by order asc
- `getTestimonials()` — sorted by order asc
- `getResolvedHighlights()` — resolves `reference()` to full entry, sorted by order
- `getAwards()` — resolves project reference, sorted by order
- Handbook helpers: `getHandbookGroups()`, `getHandbookPages()`, `getTopLevelHandbookPages()`, `getHandbookChildren(parentId)`, `getHandbookParent(entry)`, `getHandbookBreadcrumbs(entry)`, `getHandbookIndex()` (full grouped structure)

**`/Users/andrefurt/code/significa.co/src/lib/content-errors.ts`**
Single function `contentError(component, file, message): never` — throws with formatted message including component name, file path, and fix instruction. Used by MDX components for build-time validation.

**`/Users/andrefurt/code/significa.co/src/lib/seo.ts`**
JSON-LD generators:
- `organizationJsonLd()` — Organization schema
- `articleJsonLd(options)` — Article schema with author, image, publisher
- `breadcrumbJsonLd(items)` — BreadcrumbList schema

---

### Icon System

No SVG sprite sheets. No external icon library. The only icon system is the custom **mosaic icon** system:
- `/Users/andrefurt/code/significa.co/src/lib/mosaic-icons.ts` — data definitions
- `/Users/andrefurt/code/significa.co/src/components/mosaic-icon.astro` — renderer
- Currently only one icon registered: `arrow` (7x7 grid)
- SVGs are inline, generated from data at build time
- The only SVG files on disk are `/Users/andrefurt/code/significa.co/public/favicon.svg` (and its dist copy)

---

### Animation Libraries

**None found.** Searched for: `framer-motion`, `motion.dev`, `gsap`, `@spring`, `anime.js`. Zero matches.

Animation is done entirely via CSS: `transition` properties using `var(--duration-fast/normal/slow)` and `var(--ease-out)`. The mosaic icon system uses CSS custom property interpolation for state transitions. The projects index has a `@keyframes slideDown` for the filter panel. The blog uses `@keyframes fadeIn` for tag filtering.

---

### Component Libraries

**None found.** Searched for: `radix`, `shadcn`, `headless`, `@radix-ui`. Zero matches. All UI is custom-built with scoped CSS in Astro components.

---

### client: Directives (React Islands)

**Zero `client:` directives found** in the entire codebase. No React islands are active. `@astrojs/react` is configured but no React components exist or are hydrated. All interactivity uses vanilla `<script>` tags (tag filtering on blog, filter panel on projects).

---

### src/pages/ — All Routes

| File | Route | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `index.astro` | `/` | Homepage |
| `404.astro` | `/404` | Custom 404 |
| `careers.astro` | `/careers` | Static, hardcoded data |
| `impact.astro` | `/impact` | Static, hardcoded partner data |
| `legal.astro` | `/legal` | Privacy policy + T&C |
| `what-we-do.astro` | `/what-we-do` | Uses `getProjects()`, `getClients()` |
| `who-we-are.astro` | `/who-we-are` | Uses `getClients()`, `getTestimonials()` |
| `work-with-us.astro` | `/work-with-us` | Uses `getClients()`, `getTestimonials()` |
| `[...slug].astro` | `/*` | Catch-all for `pages` collection MDX |
| `blog/index.astro` | `/blog` | Uses `getPosts()`, tag filter via `<script>` |
| `blog/[slug].astro` | `/blog/:slug` | Full article, JSON-LD, related projects |
| `blog/rss.xml.ts` | `/blog/rss.xml` | RSS feed API route via `@astrojs/rss` |
| `projects/index.astro` | `/projects` | Uses `getProjects()`, filter panel via `<script>` |
| `projects/[slug].astro` | `/projects/:slug` | MDX render, minimal styling (unstyled) |
| `playground/index.astro` | `/playground` | Static with hardcoded open-source links |
| `playground/[slug].astro` | `/playground/:slug` | MDX render, minimal |
| `handbook/index.astro` | `/handbook` | Uses `getHandbookIndex()` |
| `handbook/[...slug].astro` | `/handbook/:slug+` | Sidebar nav, breadcrumbs, child pages |

---

### Data Fetching Patterns

All data fetching is build-time (`getCollection`, `getEntry` from `astro:content`). No `fetch()` calls. No API calls. No runtime data loading. Patterns:
- Simple: `await getCollection("xyz")` → sort → use
- Cross-reference: `await getEntry(ref.collection, ref.id)` for `reference()` fields
- Parallel: `await Promise.all([...])` in handbook slug page (breadcrumbs + children + index)
- `getStaticPaths()` uses `getPosts()` / `getProjects()` etc. for static path generation

---

### Content YAML Files

**Awards (8 files):** Each has `award`, `year`, `project` (string slug, NOT a reference — inconsistency noted), `url?`, `order`.

Example (`red-dot-2025-shelf.yaml`):
```yaml
award: Red Dot
year: 2025
project: mishmash
url: https://www.red-dot.org
order: 1
```

**Clients (10 files):** `name`, `logo` (local path like `/logos/allo.svg`), `url?`, `order`.

**Highlights (4 files):** `order`, `label?`, `source.collection` (projects/blog/playground), `source.entry` (slug).

Example (`01-example-project.yaml`):
```yaml
order: 1
label: Featured Project
source:
  collection: projects
  entry: mishmash
```

**Testimonials (3 files):** `quote`, `author`, `role`, `company`, `order`.

**Handbook-groups (9 files):** `title`, `order`. Groups: Knowing Significa, Working at Significa, Working with Significa, Brand and Marketing, Design, Engineering, Strategy and Product, Recruitment, Changelog.

---

### Homepage (`src/pages/index.astro`) Structure

The homepage is on the `design` branch and has been significantly reworked. It uses hardcoded mock data for most sections (blog posts, awards, metrics) while only `getResolvedHighlights()` is actually fetched from content.

7 sections:
1. **Hero** — Full-viewport, `Significa®` + "Mean something." headline, highlight rows (from content) each with `MosaicIcon name="arrow"` that animates on hover via `--mosaic-state: 0/1`
2. **Showreel** — Empty `<section>` placeholder (min-height 560px, beige-100 bg)
3. **Intro** — Centered text block, 200px top padding
4. **Prizes** — 2x2 grid: 3 `ProjectCard` components + 1 custom awards card with `AwardRow` list (all hardcoded mock data)
5. **Services** — Two `ServiceList` components (design services, dev services — all hardcoded)
6. **Highlights** — 2fr/1fr grid of two `HighlightCard` components (hardcoded copy)
7. **Blog** — 4-col grid of `BlogCard` components (hardcoded mock posts)

Page container: max-width 1512px, 0.5rem gap, all sections treated as cards with border-radius 0.75rem on the hero.

---

### Layouts

**`/Users/andrefurt/code/significa.co/src/layouts/base.astro`** — The only layout. Includes:
- `<ClientRouter />` (Astro View Transitions)
- `SEO` component in `<head>`
- Google Sans Flex via Google Fonts CDN (`fonts.googleapis.com`)
- Organization JSON-LD inline script
- `Header` + `<main>` slot + `Footer`
- Skip-to-content link
- Imports `global.css`

---

### Design Tokens (`src/styles/tokens.css`)

**Color palettes (OKLCH):** 10 palettes, each with 15 stops (25 to 950): gray, beige, green, marine, orange, purple, yellow, sea, red, pink.

**Semantic tokens:**
- `--color-text`: `--gray-950`
- `--color-text-muted`: `--gray-600`
- `--color-surface`: `--gray-25`
- `--color-surface-alt`: `--gray-50`
- `--color-border`: `--gray-200`
- `--color-border-subtle`: `color-mix(in oklch, text 12%, transparent)`
- `--color-primary`: `oklch(45% 0.15 264)` (blue-ish)
- `--color-primary-hover`: `oklch(38% 0.15 264)`
- `--color-error` / `--color-success`

**Typography:**
- `--font-sans`: "Google Sans Flex" (variable, loaded via CDN)
- `--font-display`: "N27" (self-hosted in `/public/fonts/`, 6 weights: 100/200/300/400/500/700)
- `--font-mono`: system monospace stack
- Type scale: `--text-sm` through `--text-4xl` — all fluid `clamp()` values
- Line heights: `--leading-tight: 1.2`, `--leading-normal: 1.6` (note: `--leading-relaxed` referenced in blog but not defined — likely missing token)

**Layout:**
- `--max-width: 72rem` (1152px)
- `--max-width-narrow: 48rem` (768px)
- `--gutter: 1.5rem` (24px)

**Transitions:**
- `--duration-fast: 150ms`
- `--duration-normal: 250ms`
- `--duration-slow: 400ms`
- `--ease-out: cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)`

---

### Notable Findings and Gaps

1. **`--leading-relaxed` is used in `blog/[slug].astro`** (for `p` elements) but is not defined in `tokens.css`. This will fall back to the browser default and is a missing token.

2. **`--text-xs` is referenced** in `project-card.astro`, `project-cross-sell.astro`, and `blog/index.astro` but is not defined in `tokens.css`. Missing token.

3. **`--color-primary`** is used for checkboxes/filter UI in `projects/index.astro` and `--color-primary-hover` for hover states, but these tokens are defined as OKLCH blue values. They are not used anywhere in the homepage design.

4. **The `projects/[slug].astro` detail page has zero styling** — just a bare `<article>` with `<header>`. Clearly a placeholder.

5. **`blog-card.astro`** has no image support — the `card-media` div is a colored placeholder only. The actual `blog/index.astro` and `blog/[slug].astro` pages render their own image tags directly, bypassing this component.

6. **Homepage is using hardcoded mock data** for 6 of 7 sections (only highlights are from content). Awards, project metrics, services, blog posts, and highlight cards are all hardcoded in the frontmatter script.

7. **`awards` YAML files** use a plain string for `project` (`project: mishmash`) not a typed `reference()`. However `collections.ts` calls `getEntry("projects", a.data.project.id)` — meaning the schema likely uses `reference("projects")` which resolves to an object with an `.id` property. The YAML `project: mishmash` is shorthand that Astro resolves automatically.

8. **`careers.astro`** references `https://assets.significa.co/website/test-TKzoOc.png` (a test placeholder image), as do `impact.astro`, `who-we-are.astro`, and `playground/index.astro`. These are clearly in-progress pages using placeholder assets.

9. **`--color-text-subtle`** is referenced in `tokens.css` comment style (`color-mix`) but no component uses it directly as a named token.

10. **Google Sans Flex is loaded via Google Fonts CDN** (`fonts.googleapis.com`) in `base.astro`, while N27 is self-hosted. This means a third-party font dependency for the body typeface.

content.thinking: Now I have comprehensive data from all three agents. Let me compile this into a structured audit report.

content.text:
# Repository Audit: significa.co

## 1. Project Structure

| Attribute | Value |
|---|---|
| Framework | Astro v5.17.3 |
| Package manager | pnpm (confirmed) |
| TypeScript | Strict mode (via `astro/tsconfigs/strict`) |
| Path aliases | `@/*` → `./src/*` |
| Output | Static (Cloudflare Pages → `dist/`) |
| Integrations | MDX, React (islands), Sitemap |

### `src/` directories

| Directory | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `components/` | 10 Astro components + 6 MDX components (no React) |
| `content/` | 10 collections: projects, blog, playground, pages, highlights, clients, testimonials, awards, handbook-groups, handbook |
| `layouts/` | Single `base.astro` layout |
| `lib/` | 5 utility modules: cdn, collections, content-errors, mosaic-icons, seo |
| `pages/` | 18 route files across 5 sections |
| `styles/` | 3 files: reset.css, tokens.css, global.css |

---

## 2. Routing

- **Router:** Astro file-based routing + `<ClientRouter />` (View Transitions)
- **Homepage:** `src/pages/index.astro` (modified on current `design` branch)
- **Layout:** `src/layouts/base.astro` wraps all pages (Header + `<main>` slot + Footer)

18 routes total across `/`, `/blog/*`, `/projects/*`, `/playground/*`, `/handbook/*`, plus standalone pages (`careers`, `impact`, `legal`, `what-we-do`, `who-we-are`, `work-with-us`) and a catch-all `[...slug].astro` for the `pages` collection.

---

## 3. Styling System

**Approach:** Vanilla CSS. Scoped `<style>` in Astro components + `global.css` for base styles + `tokens.css` for custom properties. No Tailwind. No CSS Modules. No CSS framework.

**Global styles:** `src/styles/global.css` (imports reset + tokens, declares `@font-face`, sets body/heading/link defaults, `.sr-only`, `.skip-link`, `prefers-reduced-motion`)

### All CSS custom properties in `tokens.css`

**Color palettes (OKLCH) -- 10 palettes, 15 shades each (25-950):**

`--gray-*`, `--beige-*`, `--green-*`, `--marine-*`, `--orange-*`, `--purple-*`, `--yellow-*`, `--sea-*`, `--red-*`, `--pink-*`

**Semantic colors:**

| Token | Value |
|---|---|
| `--color-text` | `var(--gray-950)` |
| `--color-text-muted` | `var(--gray-600)` |
| `--color-surface` | `var(--gray-25)` |
| `--color-surface-alt` | `var(--gray-50)` |
| `--color-border` | `var(--gray-200)` |
| `--color-border-subtle` | `color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-text) 12%, transparent)` |
| `--color-primary` | `oklch(45% 0.15 264)` |
| `--color-primary-hover` | `oklch(38% 0.15 264)` |
| `--color-error` | `oklch(55% 0.2 27)` |
| `--color-success` | `oklch(55% 0.15 155)` |

**Typography:**

| Token | Value |
|---|---|
| `--font-sans` | `"Google Sans Flex", system-ui, sans-serif` |
| `--font-display` | `"N27", system-ui, sans-serif` |
| `--font-mono` | system monospace stack |
| `--text-sm` | `clamp(0.8125rem, 0.75rem + 0.2vw, 0.875rem)` |
| `--text-base` | `clamp(0.9375rem, 0.875rem + 0.2vw, 1rem)` |
| `--text-lg` | `clamp(1.125rem, 1rem + 0.4vw, 1.25rem)` |
| `--text-xl` | `clamp(1.25rem, 1rem + 0.8vw, 1.5rem)` |
| `--text-2xl` | `clamp(1.5rem, 1rem + 1.5vw, 2rem)` |
| `--text-3xl` | `clamp(2rem, 1rem + 3vw, 3rem)` |
| `--text-4xl` | `clamp(2.5rem, 1.5rem + 4vw, 4rem)` |
| `--leading-tight` | `1.2` |
| `--leading-normal` | `1.6` |
| `--weight-normal` | `400` |
| `--weight-medium` | `500` |
| `--weight-semibold` | `600` |
| `--weight-bold` | `700` |

**Layout:**

| Token | Value |
|---|---|
| `--max-width` | `72rem` (1152px) |
| `--max-width-narrow` | `48rem` (768px) |
| `--gutter` | `1.5rem` (24px) |

**Transitions:**

| Token | Value |
|---|---|
| `--duration-fast` | `150ms` |
| `--duration-normal` | `250ms` |
| `--duration-slow` | `400ms` |
| `--ease-out` | `cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)` |

**No Tailwind config** exists anywhere.

---

## 4. Typography

| Font | Loading | Files | Weights |
|---|---|---|---|
| **N27** (display) | Self-hosted `@font-face` in `global.css` | 6 OTF files in `public/fonts/` | 100, 200, 300, 400, 500, 700 |
| **Google Sans Flex** (body) | Google Fonts CDN `<link>` in `base.astro` | None local | Variable 100-900 |

Both are configured and working. N27 is referenced via `var(--font-display)`, Google Sans Flex via `var(--font-sans)`. Body default is `--font-sans`. Monospace uses a system stack via `var(--font-mono)`.

One inconsistency: `blog/[slug].astro` line 343 hardcodes a monospace stack instead of using `--font-mono`.

---

## 5. Components

### Top-level (`src/components/`)

| File | Description |
|---|---|
| `header.astro` | Fixed nav with logo + 4 links, `aria-current` active state |
| `footer.astro` | 3-column nav, blog latest, B Corp badges, copyright |
| `seo.astro` | OG/Twitter/canonical meta tags |
| `award-row.astro` | Single award line: name, year, project |
| `blog-card.astro` | Blog post card with colored placeholder (no image) |
| `highlight-card.astro` | Content card with bg/fg colors, large/small variants |
| `project-card.astro` | Project card with metrics and trend indicators |
| `service-list.astro` | Service category with linked items |
| `mosaic-icon.astro` | SVG grid icon with CSS-driven idle/hover states (**new, untracked**) |

### MDX components (`src/components/mdx/`)

| File | Description |
|---|---|
| `components.ts` | Central registry for MDX component mapping |
| `media-image.astro` | CDN image with srcset, `<figure>` wrapper |
| `media-video.astro` | CDN video with autoplay/controls options |
| `comparison-block.astro` | Before/after side-by-side images |
| `metrics.astro` | Key metrics grid (`<dl>`) |
| `project-cross-sell.astro` | Cross-reference card to another project |

**No `ui/` or `primitives/` subdirectory exists.**

**Icon system:** Custom mosaic icon system (`mosaic-icon.astro` + `mosaic-icons.ts`). Only 1 icon defined so far: `arrow` (7x7 grid). No SVG sprites, no icon font, no external icon library.

**Animation:** Zero animation libraries installed. All motion is CSS transitions using duration/ease tokens. The mosaic icon system uses CSS custom property interpolation. Two `@keyframes` exist inline (blog `fadeIn`, projects `slideDown`).

---

## 6. Data Layer

- **No CMS.** Content lives in git as typed MDX/YAML files.
- **Content directory:** `src/content/` with 10 collections
- **Schema:** `src/content.config.ts` with Zod validation
- **Access:** `src/lib/collections.ts` wraps `getCollection`/`getEntry` with sorting/resolving
- **Cross-references:** `reference()` for build-time validated links (highlights → projects/blog, awards → projects)
- **Drafts:** `*.draft.mdx` filename convention (filtered at loader level in production)

Content volume: 2 projects, 3 blog posts, 2 playground items, 2 pages, 4 highlights, 10 clients, 3 testimonials, 8 awards, 9 handbook groups, 8 handbook pages.

---

## 7. Dependencies

**Runtime:**

| Package | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `astro` ^5.17.3 | Core framework |
| `@astrojs/mdx` ^4.3.13 | MDX content |
| `@astrojs/react` ^4.4.2 | React islands (configured but **unused**) |
| `@astrojs/rss` ^4.0.15 | RSS feed (used as API route, not integration) |
| `@astrojs/sitemap` ^3.7.0 | Sitemap generation |
| `react` ^19.2.4 | React runtime (**no components use it**) |
| `react-dom` ^19.2.4 | React DOM (**no components use it**) |

**No animation library.** No component library. No utility library. Minimal dependency surface.

---

## Gaps & Risks

### Missing tokens (referenced but undefined)

| Token | Used in | Impact |
|---|---|---|
| `--text-xs` | `project-card.astro`, `project-cross-sell.astro`, `blog/index.astro` | Falls back to inherited size; visually unpredictable |
| `--leading-relaxed` | `blog/[slug].astro` | Falls back to inherited line-height |

### Font performance

- N27 is served as **OTF only** (no woff2). Each weight is ~35KB uncompressed. WOFF2 would be ~50-60% smaller. 6 weights = ~210KB OTF vs ~90KB estimated WOFF2.

### Inconsistencies

- `blog/[slug].astro` hardcodes a monospace font stack instead of using `var(--font-mono)`
- CLAUDE.md documents a `labs/` collection but the codebase uses `playground/` everywhere
- `prettier-plugin-tailwindcss` is mentioned in MEMORY.md as vestigial but is no longer in `.prettierrc.mjs` (already cleaned up)

### Work in progress (current `design` branch)

- Homepage (`index.astro`) uses **hardcoded mock data** for 6 of 7 sections. Only highlights fetch from content.
- `mosaic-icon.astro` and `mosaic-icons.ts` are new, untracked files
- `tokens.css` is modified (the 10 OKLCH palettes were recently added)
- Only gray palette shades are wired to semantic tokens. The other 9 palettes (beige, green, marine, orange, purple, yellow, sea, red, pink) exist as raw tokens only.

### Things that would need creation from scratch

- **No `ui/` component layer.** Buttons, inputs, badges, etc. don't exist as reusable components.
- **No icon library** beyond the single mosaic `arrow`. Any new icons need to be defined in `mosaic-icons.ts` or a different system introduced.
- **No animation utilities.** Any complex motion work would need a library or custom CSS.
- **No dark mode infrastructure.** No `prefers-color-scheme` queries, no theme tokens, no toggle.
- **`projects/[slug].astro` is unstyled.** Just a bare `<article>` with a `<header>`. Needs full template.
- Several standalone pages (`careers`, `impact`, `who-we-are`, `playground/index`) use placeholder test images from `assets.significa.co`.

---

## FASE 1 — Leitura (não toques em nada)

Lê estes ficheiros por esta ordem:

1. CLAUDE.md (raiz) — se existir
2. .claude/settings.json — se existir
3. .cursorrules / agent.md / .windsurfrules — qualquer ficheiro de agent config que encontres

11. src/lib/collections.ts
12. src/lib/mosaic-icons.ts
13. src/components/mosaic-icon.astro
14. src/components/header.astro
15. src/components/highlight-card.astro
16. src/components/blog-card.astro
17. src/pages/index.astro
18. package.json

---

## FASE 2 — Audit report (ainda não tocas em nada)

Produz um report estruturado com:

**CLAUDE.md atual**
- Existe? Se sim, o que cobre?
- O que está em falta, desatualizado, ou errado?

**Mosaic icon system**
- Como funciona o hover atualmente? (CSS custom property? :has()? data attribute? outra coisa?)
- O size prop já existe ou está hardcoded a 14px?
- Como estão estruturadas as definições de icons em mosaic-icons.ts?
- Qual é exatamente o formato de cada célula/frame?

**Regras implícitas não documentadas**
- Convenções que existem no código mas não estão escritas em lado nenhum

**Inconsistências encontradas**
- Valores hardcoded que violam o sistema de tokens
- Referências a collections ou ficheiros que não existem (ex: labs/ vs playground/)
- Qualquer outra coisa que pareça errada

Mostra-me este report e para. Não avanças para a Fase 3 sem eu confirmar.

---

## FASE 3 — Implementação (só depois da minha confirmação)

### 1. Cria ou reescreve CLAUDE.md na raiz do projeto

O ficheiro deve ter estas secções:

**Project Overview**
- O que é o projeto
- Stack: Astro v5, vanilla CSS, pnpm, TypeScript strict, output estático para Cloudflare Pages
- Path alias: @/* → ./src/*
- Sem Tailwind, sem framework CSS, sem component library, sem animation library

**Design Fidelity Standard**
Inclui exatamente isto:

> Todo o trabalho de UI tem de corresponder exatamente ao design do Figma.
>
> Antes de considerar um componente concluído:
> 1. Corre pnpm dev
> 2. Tira screenshot do componente no browser
> 3. Compara com a referência do Figma
> 4. Verifica: espaçamento, tipografia, cores, border-radius, peso das bordas, alinhamento
> 5. Se houver qualquer diferença visual — corrige, não faças commit
>
> O critério é: um designer a olhar para os dois não consegue ver diferença.
>
> Checklist de verificação visual:
> - [ ] Font family correto (--font-sans vs --font-display)
> - [ ] Font weight correto (regular vs medium)
> - [ ] Tamanho de texto usa token da escala
> - [ ] Cor usa token semântico
> - [ ] Espaçamentos/padding corretos
> - [ ] Bordas com peso correto (0.5px hairlines)
> - [ ] Border-radius correto
> - [ ] Hover states transitam corretamente
> - [ ] Alinhamento correto

**Token System — Regras não negociáveis**

> NUNCA hardcodes:
> - Cores (sem hex, sem rgb(), sem oklch() em ficheiros de componentes)
> - Font families (sem strings "Google Sans Flex" ou "N27" em estilos de componentes)
> - Font sizes (sem valores px ou rem literais — usa tokens da escala)
> - Espaçamentos (sem valores px arbitrários — usa tokens ou múltiplos de 0.25rem)
> - Transições (sem "150ms" literais — usa --duration-fast, --duration-normal, etc.)
> - Border-radius (sem "12px" literais — usa tokens ou documenta a exceção)
>
> USA SEMPRE:
> - Cores → var(--color-*) tokens semânticos, nunca tokens de paleta raw (var(--gray-*)) em componentes
> - Tipografia → var(--text-*) para tamanho, var(--font-*) para família, var(--weight-*) para peso
> - Transições → var(--duration-*) e var(--ease-*)
>
> ATENÇÃO — os nomes dos tokens de fonte são contra-intuitivos:
> - var(--font-sans) = Google Sans Flex → fonte de corpo/hero/UI geral
> - var(--font-display) = N27 → fonte de labels, caps, metadados
> Não os troquem.
>
> Se precisas de um valor que não existe como token:
> 1. Verifica se existe com outro nome
> 2. Se não existe, adiciona o token a tokens.css primeiro
> 3. NUNCA adiciona um valor one-off diretamente a um componente

**Component Patterns**

> Framework: Astro components (.astro). Sem React a menos que seja explicitamente necessário client-side.
> Styling: blocos <style> scoped dentro de ficheiros .astro. Um componente, um ficheiro.
> Estado e interatividade: CSS-only por defeito.
> - Hover: pseudo-classe :hover
> - Estado driven pelo pai: CSS custom properties definidas no pai, lidas pelo filho
> - Classes condicionais: class:list={[{ 'is-active': condition }]}
> - JavaScript/React: só se o CSS genuinamente não conseguir fazer o que é preciso
>
> Não introduzir JS client-side para nada que CSS consiga fazer.
> O sistema de animação dos mosaic icons é CSS-only. Este é o padrão a seguir.
>
> Props: sempre tipadas com interface. Sem any implícito.
> Conteúdo: nunca hardcoded em componentes. Dados vêm de props.

**Mosaic Icon System**

> Os icons são grids 7×7 de elipses CSS ("eggs").
> Ficheiros do sistema:
> - src/components/mosaic-icon.astro — o componente renderer
> - src/lib/mosaic-icons.ts — definições dos icons (frames idle + hover)
>
> Para usar um icon: <MosaicIcon icon={icons.arrow} size={16} />
> Para adicionar um icon novo: adicionar definição a mosaic-icons.ts seguindo o padrão existente.
>
> Nunca criar SVG icons para elementos de UI que pertencem ao sistema mosaic.
> O sistema mosaic é a linguagem de icons deste projeto.
>
> [Documenta aqui o formato exato de definição de células/frames descoberto na Fase 2]

**Content & Data**

> Todo o conteúdo vive em src/content/ como ficheiros MDX/YAML tipados.
> Acesso via src/lib/collections.ts — nunca chamar getCollection() diretamente em páginas.
> Schema validado por Zod em src/content.config.ts.
> Nunca hardcodes conteúdo que pertence a uma collection.

**Git Workflow**

> CADA sessão termina com commit. Sem exceções.
>
> Depois de cada unidade de trabalho significativa:
>   git add -A
>   git commit -m "<verb> <what>: <brief description>"
>
> Formato da mensagem de commit:
> - Inglês, modo imperativo
> - Específico: "add highlight-row component with CSS hover states"
> - Não genérico: "update components", "fix stuff", "wip"
>
> Uma mudança lógica por commit. Não agrupar mudanças não relacionadas.
>
> Branching:
>   feature/<short-description>
>   fix/<short-description>
>   chore/<short-description>
>
> Após cada sessão:
>   git status ← confirmar que nada ficou untracked

**Workflow Rules**

> Antes de escrever código:
> 1. Lê os ficheiros relevantes existentes. Entende o padrão antes de adicionar.
> 2. Verifica se existe um token para o valor que precisas.
> 3. Verifica se já existe um componente que faz o que precisas.
>
> Quando algo é ambíguo: pergunta. Não adivinhas. Não inventas.
> "Não tinha a certeza, por isso usei X" não é aceitável. Para e clarifica.
>
> Quando terminares:
> - Tira screenshot e compara com a referência de design
> - Grep nos ficheiros modificados por valores hardcoded
> - Corre git diff e lê cada linha antes de fazer commit
> - Commit

**Quirks & Decisões conhecidas**

> Documenta aqui o que descobriste na Fase 2 sobre:
> - Porquê --font-sans = Google Sans Flex e --font-display = N27 (naming contra-intuitivo)
> - N27 servido como OTF em vez de WOFF2 (dívida de performance, marcar para resolver)
> - React instalado mas sem componentes em uso (configurado para futuros islands)
> - Qualquer outro quirk relevante encontrado no audit

---

### 2. Corrige a inconsistência labs/ vs playground/

Encontra todas as referências a "labs" em ficheiros de documentação/config e substitui por "playground" onde aplicável.

---

### 3. Cria ou atualiza .claude/settings.json
```json
{
  "permissions": {
    "allow": [
      "Bash(git add:*)",
      "Bash(git commit:*)",
      "Bash(git status:*)",
      "Bash(git diff:*)",
      "Bash(git log:*)",
      "Bash(pnpm install:*)",
      "Bash(pnpm dev:*)",
      "Bash(pnpm build:*)",
      "Bash(pnpm typecheck:*)"
    ]
  }
}
```

---

### 4. Commit
```bash
git add -A
git commit -m "chore: add CLAUDE.md with design fidelity standards and token guardrails"
```

---

## Output final

Mostra-me:
1. O conteúdo completo do CLAUDE.md criado
2. O conteúdo do .claude/settings.json
3. Lista de todos os ficheiros modificados com diff
4. O hash do commit

file.content:
# Significa Website Significa's company website. Static site built with Astro v5, MDX for rich content, TypeScript strict. No CMS, no database, no server. Content lives in git as typed MDX/YAML files. Marketing team manages content directly with AI assistance. **Live site:** significa.co **Stack:** Astro v5 (latest stable), MDX, TypeScript strict, Content Collections with Zod, React (islands only) **Deploy:** Cloudflare Pages (static output to `dist/`) --- ## Commands ```bash pnpm dev # Development server with HMR pnpm build # Build static site to dist/ pnpm preview # Preview built site locally pnpm check # TypeScript + content validation (astro check) pnpm lint # Full lint pipeline: Prettier + type check + ESLint pnpm lint:check # ESLint only pnpm lint:fix # ESLint auto-fix pnpm format # Prettier auto-format src/ pnpm format:check # Prettier check (no write) ``` Before pushing: `pnpm lint && pnpm build` --- ## Critical Rules These always apply, regardless of the task. 1. **Static site. No exceptions.** No API routes, no server-side logic, no `fetch()` for content. Everything renders at build time. 2. **Astro components first.** React only for interactive islands with explicit `client:*` directives. If it can be done without JS, do it without JS. 3. **Content Collections are the database.** Use `getCollection()` and `getEntry()` from `astro:content`. Never `import.meta.glob`. Never raw file reads. 4. **References use `reference()`.** Cross-collection links must use Astro's `reference()` for build-time validation. Broken slugs break the build, not production. 5. **Fail at build time. Always.** The site is managed by marketing and non-technical people. Runtime errors are unacceptable. Use `reference()`, require fields, throw on invalid data. 6. **TypeScript strict.** Type all props with `interface Props`. No `any`. 7. **Semantic HTML.** `
`, `
`, `
`, `
`, `
`, `
`, ``. Not everything is a `
`. 8. **No CSS framework.** Scoped `

1→import { defineCollection, reference, z } from "astro:content";
     2→import { glob, type Loader } from "astro/loaders";
     3→
     4→// ============================================================
     5→// Shared schemas (reusable across collections)
     6→// ============================================================
     7→
     8→const seoSchema = z.object({
     9→  metaTitle: z.string().optional(),
    10→  metaDescription: z.string().optional(),
    11→  ogImage: z.string().optional(),
    12→});
    13→
    14→/**
    15→ * A single metric shown on project cards (e.g. "55%↑", "3.2x").
    16→ * Used in project frontmatter and rendered on the homepage showcase.
    17→ */
    18→const metricSchema = z.object({
    19→  value: z.string(),
    20→  label: z.string(),
    21→});
    22→
    23→// ============================================================
    24→// Loader
    25→// ============================================================
    26→const contentLoader = ({ base, extensions }: { extensions: string[]; base: string }): Loader => {
    27→  // id generation: strip file extensions for clean URLs
    28→  const stripExtension = ({ entry }: { entry: string }) => {
    29→    return entry.replace(/\.(mdx?|yaml)$/, "");
    30→  };
    31→
    32→  // filter drafts only in production
    33→  const draftFilter = import.meta.env.MODE === "development" ? "**" : "!(*.draft)";
    34→  // filter extensions
    35→  const extensionFilter = extensions.length > 1 ? `{${extensions.join(",")}}` : extensions[0];
    36→
    37→  return glob({
    38→    pattern: `**/${draftFilter}.${extensionFilter}`,
    39→    base,
    40→    generateId: stripExtension,
    41→  });
    42→};
    43→
    44→// ============================================================
    45→// Collections
    46→// ============================================================
    47→
    48→const projects = defineCollection({
    49→  loader: contentLoader({
    50→    base: "src/content/projects",
    51→    extensions: ["mdx"],
    52→  }),
    53→  schema: z.object({
    54→    title: z.string(),
    55→    tagline: z.string().optional(),
    56→    client: z.string().optional(),
    57→    date: z.coerce.date(),
    58→    thumbnail: z.string(),
    59→    /** Large hero image for homepage showcase and project detail header */
    60→    heroImage: z.string().optional(),
    61→    tags: z.array(z.string()).default([]),
    62→    /** Industry categories for filtering (e.g., "fintech", "e-commerce", "healthcare") */
    63→    industry: z.array(z.string()).default([]),
    64→    /** Deliverable types for filtering (e.g., "website", "mobile-app", "design-system") */
    65→    deliverable: z.array(z.string()).default([]),
    66→    /** Key metrics shown on project cards (e.g. conversion uplift, NPS) */
    67→    metrics: z.array(metricSchema).default([]),
    68→    seo: seoSchema.optional(),
    69→    relatedProjects: z.array(reference("projects")).default([]),
    70→  }),
    71→});
    72→
    73→const blog = defineCollection({
    74→  loader: contentLoader({
    75→    extensions: ["md", "mdx"],
    76→    base: "src/content/blog",
    77→  }),
    78→  schema: z.object({
    79→    title: z.string(),
    80→    description: z.string().optional(),
    81→    date: z.coerce.date(),
    82→    author: z.string().optional(),
    83→    thumbnail: z.string().optional(),
    84→    tags: z.array(z.string()).default([]),
    85→    seo: seoSchema.optional(),
    86→    relatedProjects: z.array(reference("projects")).default([]),
    87→  }),
    88→});
    89→
    90→const playground = defineCollection({
    91→  loader: contentLoader({
    92→    extensions: ["md", "mdx"],
    93→    base: "src/content/playground",
    94→  }),
    95→  schema: z.object({
    96→    title: z.string(),
    97→    description: z.string(),
    98→    date: z.coerce.date(),
    99→    repoUrl: z.string().url().optional(),
   100→    thumbnail: z.string().optional(),
   101→    tags: z.array(z.string()).default([]),
   102→    seo: seoSchema.optional(),
   103→  }),
   104→});
   105→
   106→const pages = defineCollection({
   107→  loader: contentLoader({
   108→    extensions: ["mdx"],
   109→    base: "src/content/pages",
   110→  }),
   111→  schema: z.object({
   112→    title: z.string(),
   113→    seo: seoSchema.optional(),
   114→  }),
   115→});
   116→
   117→// ============================================================
   118→// Homepage highlights
   119→// ============================================================
   120→// Each entry references an item in another collection.
   121→// Astro validates every slug at build time: typos break the build, not prod.
   122→
   123→const highlights = defineCollection({
   124→  loader: contentLoader({
   125→    extensions: ["yaml"],
   126→    base: "src/content/highlights",
   127→  }),
   128→  schema: z.object({
   129→    label: z.string().optional(),
   130→    source: z.discriminatedUnion("collection", [
   131→      z.object({

   137→        entry: reference("blog"),

   147→
   148→// ============================================================

   167→
   168→// ============================================================

   172→// and potentially on project pages or a dedicated social proof section.
   173→
   174→const testimonials = defineCollection({
